summary: Implemented mintPositionFor on LPVault: operator-gated LP position creation with EIP-712 intent verification, v3-style tick initialization (feeGrowthOutsideX128 convention), feeGrowthInsideLastX128 snapshot, activeLiquidity tracking, replay protection via usedIntents mapping, and USDC pull via _safeTransferFrom. Also fixed initialize() to accept and copy initial admin/operator from factory (FR-REQN compliance). 30 test assertions across 8 test contracts cover all 11 scenarios.
